posts.author: eliskakrajickova (Eliska)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I am trying to create an automation which will:

When item is in status DONE it will move to Done group and it will create new but the same item with plus 7 days due date in previous group.

I also use a condition when frequency is weekly create a due date plus 7 days.

But it gets in loop. It will create an item again but with done status aand then move it to done section and again and again,… I followed YT tutorial step by step but cannot get it right.
